overview: Koneru Lakshmaiah Education Foundation (KLEF), formerly known as KL College of Engineering and widely referred to as KL University, is a premier private deemed-to-be university with major campuses in Vaddeswaram (Guntur district), Andhra Pradesh, and Hyderabad, Telangana. The university is recognized for its industry-oriented curriculum, strong placement ecosystem, advanced research infrastructure, and technology-driven education model.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Accredited; ISO 21001:2018 Certified Institution.

placements.placementRate: 100% placement support for eligible registered engineering students
placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Qualcomm, Intel, Cisco, Goldman Sachs, Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro
placements.internationalOffers: ₹100 LPA international package recorded for B.Tech 2024-25 batch

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on KLEEE ranks, JEE Main scores, and state-level engineering entrance examinations followed by counseling and document verification.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules are announced annually through the official KLEF admissions portal.

campus.area: Multiple campuses including Vaddeswaram (Andhra Pradesh) and Hyderabad (Telangana)
campus.specialNote: Hostel charges range from ₹37,500 to ₹77,500 annually depending on occupancy and AC configuration. Mess fee is fixed at ₹92,000 per year. Additional charges include ₹5,000 registration fee and refundable electricity deposits ranging from ₹4,000 to ₹15,000.

contact.address: KL University, Green Fields, Vaddeswaram, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh – 522302, India

scholarships.details: Students with excellent KLEEE, JEE Main, and EAMCET ranks are eligible for tuition fee waivers ranging from 25% to 100%. Postgraduate students with valid GATE scores receive a monthly stipend of ₹12,400.
